summary: Completed testing of Company Structure feature (iteration 27). Backend: 9/10 tests passed (1 skipped due to invalid client credentials). Frontend: All features verified - CompanyStructureSection visible ONLY for societa clients, edit mode working with add/remove administrators and shareholders.

minor.issue: Client self-update test skipped - client credentials (c.petrazzuolo@gmail.com / TestClient123!) are invalid

action_items: Update test credentials for client_societa (c.petrazzuolo@gmail.com) if client self-update testing is needed
critical_code_review_comments: CompanyStructureSection correctly renders ONLY when tipo_cliente === 'societa'
Backend models (UserCreate, ClientUpdate, ClientInListResponse, ClientSelfUpdate) correctly include tipo_amministrazione, company_administrators, company_shareholders fields
GET /api/clients returns company structure fields for all clients
PUT /api/clients/{id} correctly updates company structure fields
Frontend edit mode shows dropdown for tipo_amministrazione with 3 options (unico, solidale, mancomunado)
Administrators form includes: Nome, Cognome, DNI/NIE, Carica/Ruolo, Data Nomina, Note
Shareholders form includes: Nome/Denominazione, CIF/NIF/NIE, Quota %, Note
Percentage indicator shows green checkmark when total is 0% or 100%, yellow warning otherwise
context_for_next_testing_agent: Company Structure feature fully functional. CompanyStructureSection component renders only for tipo_cliente='societa'. Backend supports tipo_amministrazione (unico/solidale/mancomunado), company_administrators (array of objects), company_shareholders (array of objects with percentuale field). Frontend shows percentage validation indicator. Client 'global training' (c.petrazzuolo@gmail.com) is tipo_cliente='societa' and can be used for testing.

backend_api.GET /api/clients: Returns tipo_amministrazione, company_administrators, company_shareholders for all clients
backend_api.GET /api/clients/{id}: Returns company structure fields after update
backend_api.PUT /api/clients/{id} - company_sharehol: Successfully adds/updates shareholder list with percentages
backend_api.PUT /api/clients/{id} - full update: Successfully updates all company structure fields at once
backend_api.Empty lists: Successfully clears administrators and shareholders lists

frontend_ui.CompanyStructureSection visibility - aut: ✓ NOT visible for 'FRANCESCO JUNIOR DE LISO' (tipo_cliente=autonomo)
frontend_ui.Tipo di Amministrazione card: ✓ Shows badge with current value, dropdown in edit mode
frontend_ui.Amministratori card: ✓ Shows count badge, 'Aggiungi Amministratore' button in edit mode
frontend_ui.Quote Sociali card: ✓ Shows count badge, percentage indicator, 'Aggiungi Socio' button in edit mode
frontend_ui.Administrator form fields: ✓ Nome, Cognome, DNI/NIE, Carica/Ruolo, Data Nomina, Note
frontend_ui.Delete buttons: ✓ Trash icon visible for each administrator/shareholder in edit mode

tipo_amministrazione_options.unico: Amministratore Unico - Un solo amministratore con pieni poteri
tipo_amministrazione_options.solidale: Più Amministratori Solidali - Ogni amministratore può agire autonomamente
tipo_amministrazione_options.mancomunado: Più Amministratori Mancomunados - Gli amministratori devono agire congiuntamente
